subcodes.first_line: O Lord, my Hope! This servant is a remembrance of Thy servant who hath ever been beneath the gaze of Thine eye [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: رب و رجائی ان هذا العبد تذکار من عبدک الذی کان لم یزل ملحوظا بلحظات عین
subcodes.subjects: @eulogies; reminiscences, @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @prayers (general or uncategorized), @service to others; to the Cause of God
